onboardingBulkBody: Use this when you bought inventory as a group and sell pieces from it. We will spread the cost across what you sell and show the numbers as you go.
onboardingBulkSummary: Best when you bought boxes, cases, bundles, or a mixed stack and want the app to spread the cost.
onboardingIntroBody: Pick the setup that matches how you sell. You can change this later.
onboardingSinglesBody: Use this when each item has its own name and cost. Start with one item, then add more when you are ready.
onboardingSinglesSummary: Best when you know each item's cost and want price guidance one item at a time.
onboardingTourBulkConfigBody: These are the minimum fields for grouped inventory. Start with what you paid, how many units you bought, and how many sellable items are inside.
onboardingTourBulkSummaryBody: This summary updates from your setup and gives you a quick read on cost per unit and cost per item.
onboardingTourBulkSummaryTitle: Watch the summary as you adjust
onboardingTourCreateLotActionBody: Name this inventory, confirm the type you chose, and create it. The tour will continue automatically in Setup.
onboardingTourCreateLotBody: Give this inventory a name you will recognize later. The app will take you straight into setup after creation.
onboardingTourDoneBody: Your first inventory is ready. You can keep adjusting the setup now, or come back later and the app will keep your progress.
onboardingTourSinglesAddBody: Use this add button whenever you want to capture a new item purchase. Start small and build the list as inventory comes in.
onboardingTourSinglesAddTitle: Add your first item purchase here
onboardingTourSinglesPurchasingBody: This section is where individual item inventory starts. Track each purchase row here so sales, cost basis, and market value make sense later.
onboardingTourSinglesPurchasingTitle: This is your individual item home
